title: Nepal Investment Mega Bank Limited has published a notice regarding new interest rate on deposits, loans and advances which is going to be effective from Shrawan 01, 2083
Garima Bikas Bank Limited has published a notice regarding the new interest rate for its deposits, loans & advances which is going to be effective from Shrawan 01, 2083
